summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2X Long AAL Daily ETF (AALG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in industrials equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of American Airlines Group, Inc. (AAL) stock, less fees, and expenses AALG was launched on Jul 11, 2025 and is issued by Leverage Shares.

data.title: Leverage Shares by Themes continues product expansion with a new single stock leveraged ETF, bringing investors an exciting first-to-market opportunity to amplify exposure to American Airlines (AAL)
data.text: GREENWICH, Conn., July 11, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) --  Leverage Shares by Themes, an issuer of innovative exchange-traded products, is excited to announce the launch of the Leverage Shares 2X long AAL D...

news.t: Leverage Shares by Themes continues product expansion with a new single stock leveraged ETF, bringing investors an exciting first-to-market opportunity to amplify exposure to American Airlines (AAL)

summary.pre: ETF holdings data is provided by
